phrases.english: I would like to order a plate of grilled chicken, please.
phrases.arabic: أرغب في طلب طبق دجاج مشوي، من فضلك.
phrases.pronunciation: Arghab fi talab tabaq dajaj mashwi, min fadlik.
phrases.context: Use this when ordering food at a restaurant.

phrases.english: This food is very delicious, thank you.
phrases.arabic: هذا الطعام لذيذ جداً، شكراً لكم.
phrases.pronunciation: Hatha at-ta'am ladheedh jiddan, shukran lakum.
phrases.context: Say this to compliment the chef or the server on the meal.

phrases.english: Can I have the bill, please?
phrases.arabic: هل يمكنني الحصول على الفاتورة، من فضلك؟
phrases.pronunciation: Hal yumkinuni al-husool ala al-fatoorah, min fadlik?
phrases.context: Use this to ask for the check at the end of your meal.

phrases.arabic: أنا لدي حساسية من الفول السوداني.
phrases.pronunciation: Ana ladayya hasasiyya min al-foul as-sudani.
phrases.context: Inform your server about any food allergies before ordering.

phrases.english: What is the specialty of the house?
phrases.context: Ask this to inquire about the restaurant's signature dishes.
